visual_description: The scene opens on a dark body of water at night, with a distant boat's headlights creating a bright reflection on the surface. The view then cuts to two men sitting on a bench in a dimly lit, green-hued room with tiled walls. One man, wearing a shiny silver jacket, holds a phone to his ear, while the other man, in a dark shirt, looks at him.
audio_description: A low, continuous hum, possibly from a boat engine, is audible throughout the clip.
